headline: Risk-on deepens into RTH — QQQ +2.4%, VXX stress low; MRVL joins FULC on desk

market_state.line: SPY +1.03%, QQQ +2.4%, VXX stress ratio 0.93 — tape is clean, vol suppressed, momentum entries favored.

actions.line: No hard catalyst but strong move; quarter-size — PM flags pullback risk, no catalyst confirmation.
Fresh MACD cross + low RSI, clean risk structure; half-size, early-stage setup.

watch.line: QS +16.6% on 2.31x rel vol — unusual volume confirms conviction, watch for continuation or fade.
FCEL +19.7% but rel vol only 1.0 — big move without volume support, fragile.
ENTG +13.6% on 1.83x vol — semis catching a bid alongside QQQ surge, worth tracking.
TNGX -13.7% on 2.4x vol — high-volume breakdown, potential short candidate if bounce fades.
KMX +13.3% on 1.65x vol — earnings-style move, watch for post-gap follow-through or fill.

changed: MRVL added to desk takes — now two active picks vs. FULC-only last scan.
Warsh hawkish pressure noted last scan no longer flagged — rate-sensitive risk abating.
QQQ momentum accelerated sharply (+2.4% RTH vs. pre-market read).
caveats: RTH scan as of 12:08 ET 2026-06-19 — prices stale by minutes, fast-movers may have extended significantly.
MRVL flagged by PM as vulnerable to pullback with no catalyst — quarter-size reflects that uncertainty.
